subcodes.first_line: The Pen of Will hath desired to make mention of His loved ones in Ábádih, who have cast aside the world and turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان قلم الاراده اراد ان یذکر احبائه فی آباده الذین نبذوا العالم و اقبلوا الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
